tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp --dport 53 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp --dport 53 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp --dport 8853 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp --dport 5353 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp --dport 8853 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp --dport 5353 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -S OUTPUT"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp --dport 53 -d 203.00.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp --dport 53 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECCT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp --dport 8853 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables --I OUTPUT 1 -p udp --dport 5353 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -pp tcp --dport 8853 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp --dport  5353 -d 203.0.113.1 -j REJECT; iptables -S OUTPUT
-P OUTPUT ACCEPT
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 5353 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp -m udp --dport 5353 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp -m udp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 53 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp -m udp --dport 53 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
